columns.biomass_volume: sum(0.0673 * pow(ind.dens_bois.value * pow(ind.dhp1 + ind.dhp2 + ind.dhp3 + ind.dhp4 + ind.dhp5 + ind.dhp6 + ind.dhp7 + ind.dhp8 + ind.dhp9 + ind.dhp10, 2) * ind.haut, 0.976) if ind.etat = 1) / 1257
columns.epf_necro_biomass_ratio: ((sum(0.0673 * pow(ind.dens_bois.value * pow(ind.dhp1 + ind.dhp2 + ind.dhp3 + ind.dhp4 + ind.dhp5 + ind.dhp6 + ind.dhp7 + ind.dhp8 + ind.dhp9 + ind.dhp10, 2) * ind.haut, 0.976) if ind.etat = 2) + sum(3.1415926535 / 3 * (pow(ind.dhp_b / 2 , 2) + pow(ind.dhp_e / 2, 2) + ind.dhp_b / 2 + ind.dhp_e / 2) * ind.longueur * ind.dens_bois.value if ind.etat = 3)) / 1257) / (sum(0.0673 * pow(ind.dens_bois.value * pow(ind.dhp1 + ind.dhp2 + ind.dhp3 + ind.dhp4 + ind.dhp5 + ind.dhp6 + ind.dhp7 + ind.dhp8 + ind.dhp9 + ind.dhp10, 2) * ind.haut, 0.976) if ind.etat = 1) / 1257) * 10
columns.epf_diameter_distribution: gini(ind.dhp1 + ind.dhp2 + ind.dhp3 + ind.dhp4 + ind.dhp5 + ind.dhp6 + ind.dhp7 + ind.dhp8 + ind.dhp9 + ind.dhp10) * 10
columns.soil_structure: sum(ep1*not1 + ep2*not2 + ep3*not3 + ep4*not4 + ep5*not5) / sum(ep1 + ep2 + ep3 + ep4 + ep5) * 2
